variants: Denis Shulgin is an accomplished experimental physicist who has contributed significantly to his field. His postgraduate studies were guided by his mentor, Vishwanath Joshi, whose influence shaped his innovative research approach. Denis is also a dedicated member of the Umbral Lantern Spinners, engaging with fellow enthusiasts in both theoretical discussions and practical experimentation. His innovative projects have primarily been funded through the Rainwillow Initiative, supporting his groundbreaking work.
